description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product Details Off-white two-fold textured clutch fastened by a press button closure Has thirteen card holder slots, one id card holder, four insert pockets and a zippered pocket  Material and Care Blended fabric Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 10 cm Width: 18 cm
